name: AgentAIMO Phase 4 — Competition Prep
description: AIMO 3 math solver. Deadline April 8 2026. All tests must stay green. Use Claude Sonnet for routine tasks, Opus for complex reasoning (D-tier tasks). Run `npx gitnexus analyze` after every commit. Run tests with `/root/.local/bin/pytest tests/ --tb=short -q`.

userStories.title: Swap majority vote for AnswerSelector in kaggle_notebook.py
userStories.description: Replace the Counter/majority_vote logic in notebook/kaggle_notebook.py with src/solver/answer_selector.AnswerSelector.select(). Build minimal VerificationReport objects (ConfidenceLevel.NL_JUDGMENT) for each attempt where real reports are unavailable. Read the notebook first before editing. Run gitnexus_impact on any symbol you modify.
acceptanceCriteria: notebook/kaggle_notebook.py imports and calls AnswerSelector.select()
Counter / majority_vote pattern is removed or replaced
/root/.local/bin/pytest tests/ --tb=short -q passes with no new failures
python scripts/run_baseline.py completes without error
userStories.notes: Key files: notebook/kaggle_notebook.py, src/solver/answer_selector.py, src/models/verification.py. The notebook may not have VerificationReport objects — build minimal ones: VerificationReport(passed_checks=1 if answer is not None else 0, confidence=ConfidenceLevel.NL_JUDGMENT). See docs/PHASE4_HANDOFF.md Track A for exact code snippet.

userStories.title: Add prompt reinforcement for top flaw codes in agent/prompts.py
userStories.description: Add 3 instruction phrases to the system/user prompt in agent/prompts.py to address CONTEXT_CONFABULATION, MISSING_FINAL_COMMIT, and CHANNEL_LEAKAGE — the top flaw codes from docs/BASELINE_METRICS.md. Phrases are specified exactly in docs/PHASE4_HANDOFF.md Track A.
acceptanceCriteria: agent/prompts.py includes self-contained, no-context-confabulation instruction
agent/prompts.py includes mandatory **ANSWER: N** format instruction
agent/prompts.py includes no-internal-tool-syntax instruction
All tests pass (no new failures)
userStories.notes: Exact phrases to add are in docs/PHASE4_HANDOFF.md Track A. Do NOT change the regex or extraction logic here — that is a separate task.

userStories.title: Implement select_two() two-attempt policy in AnswerSelector
userStories.description: Add select_two() method to src/solver/answer_selector.py per the spec in docs/PHASE4_HANDOFF.md Track C. Returns (best, second_best_disagreeing). Add 2 new tests to tests/test_phase3.py.
acceptanceCriteria: AnswerSelector.select_two() is implemented
test_select_two_returns_different_answers passes
test_select_two_when_unanimous passes (second answer is None when all agree)
test_select_two_with_all_none_answers passes (graceful when no answers extracted)
All tests pass
userStories.notes: Implementation spec is in docs/PHASE4_HANDOFF.md Track C. The method signature: def select_two(self, annotated_solutions) -> tuple[tuple, tuple]. When all answers are None, return (None, 'no_answer', 0.0) for both slots.

userStories.title: Integrate select_two into notebook for 2-attempt submission policy
userStories.description: Update notebook/kaggle_notebook.py to use AnswerSelector.select_two(). Attempt 1 = highest-confidence answer, Attempt 2 = highest-confidence disagreeing answer. If second is None, fall back to same as first.
acceptanceCriteria: Notebook calls select_two() instead of select() for final answer submission
Graceful fallback when second answer is None (use first answer for both attempts)
All tests pass

userStories.title: Run ablation and document extract_rate improvement
userStories.description: Run `python scripts/ablation_extraction.py` and compare extract_rate on research_data2.jsonl before vs after P4-A2 prompt changes. Write result summary to docs/ABLATION_RESULTS_P4A.md. Target: extract_rate >= 40%.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/ABLATION_RESULTS_P4A.md exists with before/after comparison
Extract rate result is documented clearly
If rate < 40%, a diagnostic note is included explaining why

userStories.title: Regenerate BASELINE_METRICS.md after Track A changes
userStories.description: Run `python scripts/run_baseline.py` and overwrite docs/BASELINE_METRICS.md with new results. Target: correct count on research_data.jsonl improves from 3/8 to >= 5/8.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/BASELINE_METRICS.md regenerated with today's date
Correct count documented clearly
If correct count < 5/8, a diagnostic note explains why

userStories.title: [CLAUDE OPUS] Formalize verification budget allocation algorithm
userStories.description: Read docs/evolution.md carefully. The core open problem is: how to optimally allocate finite verification compute budget across N solution traces and M verifiable claims per trace. Formalize this as a stochastic scheduling problem. Solve the warm-up (uniform-cost bandit case) and extend to heterogeneous costs via Lagrangian relaxation or Whittle index. Produce a concrete pseudocode algorithm for src/solver/answer_selector.py. Use extended thinking. Think deeply before writing.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/VERIFICATION_BUDGET_ALGORITHM.md produced with formal problem statement
Warm-up (uniform-cost bandit) case solved explicitly
Full heterogeneous-cost case addressed with concrete algorithm
Pseudocode is implementable in Python
userStories.notes: This task requires Claude Opus with extended thinking. Run with: /home/user/ralph-tui/dist/cli.js run --prd ./prd.json --agent claude --model opus --iterations 1. Read docs/evolution.md and docs/FORWARD_PLAN_v2.md first.

userStories.title: [CLAUDE OPUS] Diagnose why aime_2024_3 and aime_2024_5 have 0 extractions
userStories.description: From BASELINE_METRICS.md: aime_2024_3 (GT=809) and aime_2024_5 (GT=104) have no_answer_extracted with PSEUDO_VERIFICATION flaws. Read raw traces in data/verification/audit_research_data.jsonl for these two problems. Trace the extraction pipeline using gitnexus. Produce docs/EXTRACTION_FAILURE_ANALYSIS.md with root cause and concrete fix.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/EXTRACTION_FAILURE_ANALYSIS.md exists
Root cause identified: solver never reaches correct answer vs extraction strips it
Concrete fix proposed (prompt change, sampler config, or extraction rule change)
userStories.notes: Read data/verification/audit_research_data.jsonl first. Use gitnexus_query to trace the extraction pipeline. This is a diagnostic task — do not implement any changes, only analyze and document.

userStories.title: Clean up Safe-tier root clutter per MOVE_CANDIDATES.md
userStories.description: Execute only the Safe tier moves from docs/MOVE_CANDIDATES.md — chat logs, .bak files, noise files — to _attic/noise/. Do NOT touch Risky tier. Do NOT remove any Python files, test files, or docs. Run tests after to confirm nothing broke.
acceptanceCriteria: Safe-tier files moved to _attic/noise/ as specified in MOVE_CANDIDATES.md
All tests pass (no new failures)
No Python source files moved or deleted
